description:
secretx-core/src/lib.rs:1323 (and 2 others): clippy::pedantic doc_markdown flags references to type names like 'SubjectPublicKeyInfo' that lack backticks.

Mechanical fix: backtick all type names in doc comments. cargo clippy --fix can do this automatically for the obvious cases. P4.
title: Docstrings reference type names without backticks
